title: 60 Pieces, 180gsm - Coloured Card A4, Thick Cardstock Paper - 10 Assorted Colours
features: 2 to 3 times thicker than standard printer paper, but not as thick as heavyweight cardstock. Enhanced durability for your projects while retaining the versatility for crafting and printing.
Print with Laser and Inkjet printers.
10 Assorted Colours: Red, Orange, Purple, Dark Red, Light Green, Light Blue, Yellow, Blue, Green, and Pink.
A4 Size (297 x 210mm). Pack of 60 pieces, 6 pieces per colour.
description: Thickness: 180gsm. 2 to 3 times thicker than standard printer paper, but not as thick as heavyweight cardstock. Enhanced durability for your projects while retaining the versatility for crafting and printing.
